name: Granny's Punch
recipeIngredient: 2 quarts (or less) Lemon Lime Soda OR
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all of the juices in a large punch bowl.
2. Add enough soda to give the punch a kick, but not so much that it dilutes the flavor of the juices.
Note: This recipe was entered into Meal Master format by Lisa Clarke for Christmas Eve 1995.
